title: 40M 800 LED Fairy Lights Outdoor Christmas Lights Plug in Clear Wire String Lights with Remote Timer 8 Modes Waterproof for Outside Garden Tree Yard Patio Party Wedding Decorations-Warm White
features: 5cm Space Strong Ambient Fairy Lights: The string lights is designed with 5cm space between each led lights and equipped with the latest upgraded LED beads, which can offer much more brightness and double ambient than ordinary 10cm space string lights on market, to add amazing atmosphere to decorate your scene

Upgraded LED Super Bright String Lights: Equipped with latest upgraded LED bead, The Christmas lights offers super bright light to add amazing atmosphere to decorate your holiday. With unique PVC intensified cord material, The fairy string lights is strong, non-flammable and resistant to weather changes. LED beads are made of high durability and the energy efficiency material, saves up to 90% energy compared to traditional incandescent bulbs

Multi-Function String Lights: Our Christmas lights string has 8 modes for you to choose from Combination, In waves, Sequential, Slo-glo, Chasing/flash, Slow fade, Twinkle/flash, Steady on. And 4 levels of brightness 100%-75%-50%-25% Low-brightness modes significantly reduce power consumption, making your decor more energy-efficient. Use remote control or long press the button on the plug to activate timing function. There are 3 timer setting method to choose as you required. The built-in memory chip will keep your last setting and no need for reset mode. Suitable for various occasions to show different Christmas holiday atmosphere

Waterproof for Outdoor Decor: With IP44 waterproof rating, LYNNON Outdoor Christmas lights are resistant to rain, snow, and extreme temperatures [Kind Note: Please protect the plug from water]. Great decoration lights for your garden, yard, patio, bushes porch pool area camping tent balcony fence window classroom indoor and outdoor decor

Safe & Energy Efficient: Package included: 1* 800 LED String Lights, 1* remote control, 1* user manual. Equipped with 31V low voltage adapter, you don’t need to worry about any electric and fire shock or overheating. Safe to use and touch. With unique PVC intensified cord material, The outdoor fairy lights is strong, non-flammable and resistant to weather changes. LED beads are made of high durability and the energy efficiency material, saves up to 90% energy compared to traditional incandescent bulbs
